mapper.sql: id, user_id AS userId, video, lng, lat, checkid, status, reason, address, realness, create_time AS createTime, check_time AS checkTime, version, car_count AS carCount, real_address AS realAddress, real_Img AS realImg, acc_Img AS accImg, lat2, lng2, top_Falg AS topFalg, real_arr_time AS realArrTime, thumbnail_flag AS thumbnailFlag, thumbnail_url AS thumbnailUrl
mapper.select: SELECT id id, address address, thumbnail_url thumbnailUrl, create_time createDate FROM app_accident_record WHERE id = #{accid} and realness= #{state};
SELECT a.id id, video video, user_id userId, lng lng, lat lat, address address, create_time createTime FROM app_accident_record as a LEFT JOIN app_user as b ON a.user_id = b.id WHERE a.id = #{accid}

SELECT a.id id, address address, thumbnail_url thumbnailUrl, a.create_time createDate, pay_amount payAmount FROM app_accident_record AS a LEFT JOIN app_pay_amount_record AS b ON b.accid = a.id WHERE b.user_id = #{userid} AND TO_DAYS(b.create_time) = TO_DAYS(NOW()) limit #{pagesize},20

SELECT a.id id, address address, thumbnail_url thumbnailUrl, b.create_time createDate, pay_amount payAmount FROM app_accident_record AS a LEFT JOIN app_pay_amount_record AS b ON b.accid = a.id WHERE b.user_id = #{userid} limit #{pagesize},20

SELECT id id, thumbnail_url thumbnailUrl, video, address, video_id videoId, create_time createTime, reason, introduce FROM app_accident_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} order by create_time DESC limit #{pagesize},20
SELECT id id, thumbnail_url thumbnailUrl, video, address, create_time createTime, introduce FROM app_accident_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND type =#{type}
SELECT a.id id, thumbnail_url thumbnailUrl url video, address, introduce FROM app_video as a LEFT JOIN app_video_thumbs AS b ON a.id = b.video_id WHERE b.user_id = #{userId} AND b.status = 1
SELECT * FROM app_accident_record WHERE id < #{id} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 5
SELECT * FROM app_accident_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND lat = #{lat} AND lng = #{lng}
SELECT pay_amount amount FROM app_pay_amount_record WHERE accid = #{id} and type = 1

SELECT DISTINCT a.id, b.avatar avatar, b.name userId, video, address address, a.create_time createTime, thumbnail_url thumbnailUrl, img_url imgUrl FROM app_accident_record as a LEFT JOIN app_user as b ON a.user_id = b.id LEFT JOIN app_pay_amount_record as c ON a.id = c.accid WHERE statuse = 2 AND a.type = 1 AND a.video is not null AND DATEDIFF(a.create_time,NOW()) <0 AND DATEDIFF(a.create_time,NOW())>-3 order by a.create_time DESC limit #{pagesize},20
SELECT pay_amount FROM app_pay_amount_record WHERE accid = #{id}
SELECT pay_amount FROM app_pay_amount_record WHERE accid = #{id} and user_id = #{userId}
SELECT accid FROM app_pay_amount_record WHERE pay_amount >= 10 AND type = 1 order by create_time DESC limit #{pagesize},20

SELECT a.id, b.avatar avatar, b.`name` userId, video, address address, a.create_time createTime, thumbnail_url thumbnailUrl, img_url imgUrl FROM app_accident_record as a LEFT JOIN app_user as b ON a.user_id = b.id WHERE a.id = #{accid}
SELECT accid FROM app_pay_amount_record WHERE user_id = #{id} AND type = 1 order by create_time DESC limit #{pagesize},20
